data.body: 232 CI (Verified -1) was NOT a code failure: the change was based on a stale origin/main (c66044058) predating the 'CI config-gate' commit that added the 'make config-check' target — the workflow (from current main) ran 'make config-check' against the old tree -> 'No rule to make target'. Fix: rebased onto current origin/main (clean; 9.3 touches no Makefile/CI), re-ran config-check + lint + mypy + import-cycle (all green), pushed patchset 2. LLM-Review was already +1. Awaiting re-vote.
